attributes.action: Introduce a free bus fare scheme for under 16’s
attributes.additional_details: Because the government is the only people that could make this happen
attributes.background: I would like the government to make bus companies give free passes to under 16’ people under16 shouldn’t have to worry about having to pay money to get a bus to school if they live quite rurally this free pass would make more opportunities for young people to possibally get new jobsandeven socialise

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Free bus travel for under 16s
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/740392
